title: No Wolf Skin Variants
description: Removes the visual skins for the wolf variants in 1.20.5.
body:
This resource pack removes the visual skins for the wolf variants in 1.20.5.

![An image of wolves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acac4d758246dc9db5e99f2cb28dcba5fc71fa7f.png)

This resource pack uses textures from Mojang Studios. Assets are the property of Mojang Studios. This project is not affiliated with or approved by Mojang Studios. [Minecraft usage guidelines](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/usage-guidelines).
